title: Registration open for K’exej, a project to strengthen translation into Yucatec Maya
content:
Want more news translated to Yucatec Maya? Want to join a community of practice? Rising Voices and Lingua invite you to apply!

Originally published on Rising Voices

Would you like to strengthen your skills in translating from Spanish to maya t'aan?
Would you like to learn the fundamentals of translation?
Would you like there to be more news and other texts available in Yucatec Maya?
Would you like to create written content in Yucatec Maya?
Would you like to not only create written content, but also join a community of practice of Yucatec Maya translators?

title: Indigenous digital activists in Mexico assert their self-determination with regard to artificial intelligence
content:
The AI+Languages Forum brought together digital activists to call for technologies aligned with their values

Originally published on Rising Voices

The Forum brought together 47 digital activists of Indigenous languages from Mexico. Photo by Jer Clarke. CC-BY-NC.

What impact does artificial intelligence (AI) have on Mexico's Indigenous languages? This was one of the questions posed at the first AI+Indigenous Languages Forum, held on March 13 and 14 in Mexico Cit

title: Join us: Online meeting to highlight digital initiatives for Adivasi languages of India
content:
Take part in the gathering as a presenter or attendee on June 29, 2025

Originally published on Rising Voices

Do you speak an Adivasi (Indigenous) or low-resource language of India?

Do you work on a project or campaign to promote and revitalize your language using Internet-based tools or digital media?

Do you want to meet others that are promoting the use of their Indigenous language in digital spaces?

If you answered “yes,” we invite you to apply to participate in the Online Meeting: Digital Initiatives for Adivasi and low-resource languages of India.

WHERE: Online

WHEN: Sunday, June 29, 2025 (6 pm – 8 pm IST)

title: Join Us for the Edit-a-thon: Strengthening Wikipedia Malagasy with Global Voices
content:
Free workshop will take place on May 31, 2025 in four regions of Madagascar: Analamanga (Antananarivo), Matsiatra Ambony, Boeny, and Diana

Originally published on Rising Voices

A one-day edit-a-thon workshop organized by the Wikimedia Community User Group Madagascar and Global Voices Malagasy is planned for May 31, 2025 in four regions across Madagascar. The two groups invite those interested in contributing to free knowledge in Malagasy, as a way to highlight the language on more digital platforms, to sign-up to take part.

title: [Call for Participants] Workshop: Build Your Own Road Map for Javanese Language Digital Activism in Yogyakarta, Indonesia
content:
A two-day workshop co-organized by Wikimedian Community of Yogyakarta in collaboration with Rising Voices.

Originally published on Rising Voices

Illustration by Ana Huiza Capo for Rising Voices.

Do you speak Javanese and live in Yogyakarta or surrounding areas?

Are you interested in working to promote or revitalize the Javanese language in digital spaces? 

Would you like to create or strengthen a digital project for your language using the Internet, social media, or other online media?
